2026-04-16 11:33:36.288 -07:00 [INF] Executing query WITH LOOKUP( STATUS, EVENTNUM, ORDERBY ) AS (
    SELECT 1, 346, 1 UNION ALL

    SELECT 7, 363, 14 UNION ALL

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Cleared, @filter_0_1=Code Red, @filter_0_2=Docs In, @filter_0_3=Docs Out, @filter_0_4=Docs Rev, @filter_0_5=In Proc, @filter_0_6=Pre-Approval, @filter_0_7=Pre-Docs, @filter_0_8=Subordination, @filter_0_9=Appraisal Issue, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFTM ON EFTM.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFTM.IDX=354

)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354

	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY

    SELECT 20, 361, 16 UNION ALL
    SELECT 21, 0, 19)
SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND (DATEDIFF(DAY,(SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(DATE,DATES,101) FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EV.EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY EV.IDX DESC),CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),101))=0)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Cleared, @filter_0_1=Code Red, @filter_0_2=Docs In, @filter_0_3=Docs Out, @filter_0_4=Docs Rev, @filter_0_5=In Proc, @filter_0_6=Pre-Approval, @filter_0_7=Pre-Docs, @filter_0_8=Subordination, @filter_0_9=Appraisal Issue, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0)

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND (DATEDIFF(DAY,(SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(DATE,DATES,101) FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX),CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),101))=0)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EF ON EF.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EF.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2) AND (CONVERT(DATE, EF.EVENTDATE, 101) = CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE(), 101))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Funded, @filter_0_1=Purchased, @filter_0_2=Shipped, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFTM ON EFTM.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFTM.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2) AND (EFTM.EVENTDATE >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 0) AND EFTM.EVENTDATE <  DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) + 1, 0)
)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Funded, @filter_0_1=Purchased, @filter_0_2=Shipped, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9)

	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9)
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Appraisal Issue, @filter_0_1=Cleared, @filter_0_2=Code Red, @filter_0_3=Docs In, @filter_0_4=Docs Out, @filter_0_5=Docs Rev, @filter_0_6=In Proc, @filter_0_7=Pre-Approval, @filter_0_8=Pre-Docs, @filter_0_9=Subordination, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES CODES1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY=CODES1.LNKEY AND CODES1.IDX=1
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((CODES1.CODEINT<>5 OR CODES1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY

			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES CODES1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY=CODES1.LNKEY AND CODES1.IDX=1
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((CODES1.CODEINT<>5 OR CODES1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'

			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES CODES1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY=CODES1.LNKEY AND CODES1.IDX=1

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES CODES1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY=CODES1.LNKEY AND CODES1.IDX=1
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND (DATEDIFF(DAY,(SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(DATE,DATES,101) FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EV.EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY EV.IDX DESC),CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),101))=0) AND ((CODES1.CODEINT<>5 OR CODES1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1

    SELECT 15, 358, 15 UNION ALL
    SELECT 16, 359, 17 UNION ALL
    SELECT 17, 360, 18 UNION ALL
    SELECT 20, 361, 16 UNION ALL
    SELECT 21, 0, 19)
SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_1.CODEDESC AS [loan_type], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EF WITH (NOLOCK) ON EF.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EF.IDX=354
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2) AND (EF.EVENTDATE >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) - 1, 0) AND EF.EVENTDATE <  DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Purchased, @filter_0_1=Shipped, @filter_0_2=Funded, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_1.CODEDESC AS [loan_type], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Appraisal Issue, @filter_0_1=Cleared, @filter_0_2=Code Red, @filter_0_3=Docs In, @filter_0_4=Docs Out, @filter_0_5=Docs Rev, @filter_0_6=In Proc, @filter_0_7=Pre-Approval, @filter_0_8=Pre-Docs, @filter_0_9=Subordination, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_1.CODEDESC AS [loan_type], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND (DATEDIFF(DAY,(SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(DATE,DATES,101) FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX),CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),101))=0) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_1.CODEDESC AS [loan_type], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY

SELECT EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AS [loan_number], B1.BORR_LAST AS [borrower_last], LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC AS [loan_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=LOOKUP.EVENTNUM ORDER BY IDX DESC),GETDATE()),0) AS [days_in_status], ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, (SELECT TOP 1 DATES FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX), ISNULL(EFUND.EVENTDATE,GETDATE())),0) AS [days_in_process], EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.PROP_STATE AS [property_state], ITP.CAMPAIGN_NAME AS [campaign_name], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOANAMT AS [loan_amount], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APPRAISEDVAL AS [appraised_value], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.INTRATE AS [interest_rate], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LPLANDESC AS [loan_plan_name], LN_CODES_1.CODEDESC AS [loan_type], LN_CODES_4.CODEDESC AS [loan_purpose], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LTV AS [ltv], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.CLTV AS [cltv], EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.DISCFEE AS [discfee], (SELECT SUM(BORRPART) FROM EMPOWER.LN_FEES WHERE LN_FEES.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND (HUDNUMBER < 900 OR HUDNUMBER >= 1100)) AS [TOTFEES], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.APP_DATE AS [application_date], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LOCKINEXPIRES AS [lock_expiration], EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.EXPCLOSEDATE AS [expected_close_date], EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.SETTLEMENT_DATE AS [settlement_date], EFUND.EVENTDATE AS [funded_date], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LOAN_OFFICER AS [loan_officer], EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.PROCESSOR AS [processor], EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.DESCRIPTION AS [notepad_item], STA.TEAMNAME AS [agent_team], STP.TEAMNAME AS [processor_team]
FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND (DATEDIFF(DAY,(SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(DATE,DATES,101) FROM EMPOWER.LN_EVENTS EV WHERE EV.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EVENTNUM=348 ORDER BY IDX),CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE(),101))=0) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS

FROM EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)

LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_BORRINFO AS B1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = B1.LNKEY AND B1.WHICHBORR=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_30 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_30.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_30.IDX=30
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PROPINFO.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_INTVWPROCESS AS ITP ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = ITP.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_PLANDAT.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_1 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_1.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_1.IDX=1
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CODES AS LN_CODES_4 ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = LN_CODES_4.LNKEY AND LN_CODES_4.IDX=4
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_DOCGEN.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD ON EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY = EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY AND EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.IDX=(SELECT MAX(IDX) FROM EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD NP2 WHERE NP2.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_NOTEPAD.LNKEY)
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_CONTACTS C
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMP
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STP ON STP.TEAMID=STMP.TEAMID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
		ON STMP.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.PROCESSOR_USERID AND STP.TEAM_TYPE='Processor'
	LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMMEMBERS STMA
			LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.U_SET_TEAMS STA ON STA.TEAMID=STMA.TEAMID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
		ON STMA.TEAM_MEMBERID = C.LOAN_OFFICER_USERID AND STA.TEAM_TYPE='Agent'
	ON C.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY
LEFT JOIN LOOKUP ON LOOKUP.STATUS = LN_CODES_30.CODEINT
LEFT JOIN EMPOWER.LN_EVNTDATE EFUND ON EFUND.LNKEY=EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY AND EFUND.IDX=354
WHERE LN_CODES_30.CODEDESC IN (@filter_0_0, @filter_0_1, @filter_0_2, @filter_0_3, @filter_0_4, @filter_0_5, @filter_0_6, @filter_0_7, @filter_0_8, @filter_0_9) AND ((LN_CODES_1.CODEINT<>5 OR LN_CODES_1.CODEINT IS NULL))
ORDER BY EMPOWER.LN_MTGTERMS.LNKEY ASC
OFFSET @_offset ROWS
FETCH NEXT @_pageSize ROWS ONLY
 with parameters: @filter_0_0=Cleared, @filter_0_1=Code Red, @filter_0_2=Docs In, @filter_0_3=Docs Out, @filter_0_4=Docs Rev, @filter_0_5=In Proc, @filter_0_6=Pre-Approval, @filter_0_7=Pre-Docs, @filter_0_8=Subordination, @filter_0_9=Appraisal Issue, @_offset=0, @_pageSize=50000
